provenance_chain.notes: Initial vault-index.json created. Batch 1 (5 files) and Batch 2 (11 files) indexed. PEARL Diamond URL documented.

Batch 3: Kokanee Springs signage (17), Gamification (3), HB1000 Visual Assets (4), Jolene Protocol (3), CosignSimple (4), Historical Canvases 2021 (5), Foundational (1), Grace System (1), Learning Loop (7). Batch 4: Wisdom Giants visuals (2), Big Mama visuals (5), Big Mama strategy (4), Maven core strategy (5), Grace visual (1), HB1000 architecture docs (2). Addendum: Maven Portal Replit (1).

Comprehensive update for Batches 5, 6, and 7. Added 115+ files including PEARL visuals, LDP-SIC series, HB1000 code scripts, and Grace Godmother whitepaper. Note: Grace Godmother 802MB zip remains reference-only; extracted whitepaper and research files are now indexed.
